*This file is overwritten when `reproduce_hopper_v4_1m.sh` completes.*

---

## How to regenerate

```bash
# Run the full 1M benchmark (all 9 training jobs + plots + this table)
bash scripts/reproduce_hopper_v4_1m.sh

# Regenerate figures and table from existing run data only
python scripts/plot_results.py \
    --runs_dir runs/compare/1m_eval10 \
    --out_dir  reports/figures/1m

python scripts/aggregate_results.py \
    --runs_dir runs/compare/1m_eval10 \
    --out_dir  reports/figures/1m \
    --save_md  reports/results_hopper_v4_1m.md
```
